title: Savory Spicy Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry with peanuts, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of spicy and smoky flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Heat the cooking oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tender vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the spicy stir-fry sauce and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Add the smoky peanuts and roasted peanuts, and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
